# What you need to know about the Public Service Loan Forgiveness (PSLFÉ*Created: Sunday, March 12, 2023 at 4:51:12?PM*<div><b><u>What you need to know about the Public Service Loan Forgiveness (PSLF) Program</u></b><b><u> </u></b><b><u>(</u></b><b>Loan Exit Counseling</b><b>)</b><b><u><br></u></b></div>
<div><b><u><br></u></b></div>
<div><b><h2>01</h2></b></div>
<div>You must work full-time for the qualifying organization (based on the employerŐs definition of full-time or work at least 30 hours a week, whichever is greater).</div>
<div><b><h2>02</h2></b></div>
<div>You must make 120 qualifying payments in order for the remaining balance to be forgiven. A qualifying monthly payment is a payment that you make</div>
<ul>
<li>after Oct. 1, 2007;</li>
<li>under a qualifying income-driven repayment plan;</li>
<li>for the full amount due as shown on your bill;</li>
<li>no later than 15 days after your due date; and</li>
<li>while you are employed full-time by a qualifying employer.</li>
</ul>
<div><b><h2>03</h2></b></div>
<div>You can make qualifying monthly payments only during periods when youŐre required to make a payment.</div>
<div><b><h2>04</h2></b></div>
<div>You must submit aĘ<i>Public Service Loan Forgiveness (PSLF) &amp Temporary Expanded PSLF (TEPSLF) Certification &amp Application (PSLF form)</i>Ęannually or when you change employers.</div>
<div><b><h2>05</h2></b></div>
<div>Serving as a full-time AmeriCorps or Peace Corps volunteer also counts as qualifying employment for PSLF.</div>
<div><b><h2>06</h2></b></div>
<div>Student loans from private lenders do not qualify for PSLF.</div>
<div><b><h2>07</h2></b></div>
<div>Federal Family Education Loan (FFEL) Program Loans and Perkins Loans may become eligible for PSLF if they are consolidated into the Direct Loan Program.</div>
<div>Knowing this, are you interested in simulating your repayment under PSLF?</div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/png;base64,"/><br></div>
